TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Willem-Alexander, title = Willem-Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Willem-Alexander} }

S.FORM: Willem-Alexander ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 4, Willem-Alexander, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Netherlands ta' misuw hya' ga Willem-Alexander, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Willem-Alexander ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 4, Willem-Alexander, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Netherlands ta' misuw hya' ga Willem-Alexander, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: willem-alexan*er rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, willem-alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw netħerlan*s~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa willem-alexan*er, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
